seoTitle: Alfredtown vs Alice — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Alfredtown and Alice. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alfredtown and Alice.
heading: Alfredtown vs Alice — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alfredtown, New South Wales and Alice, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alice has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Alfredtown (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alfredtown or Alice safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alfredtown has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Alice scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alfredtown scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Alice scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alfredtown or Alice?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alice has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
